Part.Source:
For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where NfsCod = &NfsCod
NfsFilCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsFilCod NfsDtaEms = &WizardData.Capa.NfsDtaEms
NfsIntIs = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntIs
// NfsIntCliCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntCliCod // do 'GetIntermediario' // NfsIntRaz = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntRaz // NfsIntFonNum = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntFonNum // NfsIntCNPJ = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntCNPJ // NfsIntCidCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntCidCod // NfsIntEml = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntEml
NfsCliCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCod do 'GetCliente' NfsCliRaz = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliRaz NfsCliFonNum = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliFonNum NfsCliTipPes = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliTipPes NfsCliCep = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCep NfsCliLog = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliLog NfsCliNro = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliNro NfsCliBai = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliBai
NfsCliCidCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidCod NfsCliCidIbge = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidIbge NfsCliCidNom = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidNom
NfsCliCidUfCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidUfCod NfsCliCpl = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCpl NfsCliEml = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliEml NfsCliCnpj = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCnpj NfsCliInsEst = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliInsEst NfsCliInsMun = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliInsMun NfsCliCPF = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCPF
NfsLctCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsLctCod NfsPrsCidCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsPrsCidCod
Exit EndFor
Commit
Sub 'GetCliente' For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCod
&WizardData.Capa.NfsCliRaz = PesRaz
&WizardData.Capa.NfsCliFonNum = PesPrmFon &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliTipPes = PesTip &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCPF = PesCpf &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCnpj = PesCnpj &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliInsMun = PesInsMun
&WizardData.Capa.NfsCliInsEst = PesInsEst &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliBai = PesBai &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCep = PesCep &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliLog = PesLog &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliNro = PesNro
&WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidCod = PesCidCod Exit EndFor
do 'loadCidade' EndSub
Sub 'loadCidade'
For each Order EmpCod,CidCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CidCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidCod &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidIbge = CidIBGE &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidNom = CidNom &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidUfCod = UfeCod Exit EndFor EndSub
